display.purpose: Page title and future brand hero baseline.

headline.purpose: Section headings and result area labels.

body.purpose: Review prose, empty states, and supporting copy.

mono.purpose: Code input and code-specific material only.

motion.name: color-state
motion.purpose: Default button color transition for hover and disabled state changes.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Future animation should collapse to instant or crossfade transitions.

futureBrandSeed.note: The current code does not implement this indigo seed. Treat it as optional future brand direction, not an extracted token.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action for running a code review.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #18181b; color: #ffffff; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; font: 500 14px/1.5 Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, opacity 150ms ease-out; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #27272a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #3f3f46; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Code Textarea
components.description: Monospace code input with visible border and blue focus state.
components.css: .ds-code-field { width: 100%; min-height: 320px; resize: none; border: 1px solid #d4d4d8; border-radius: 8px; background: #fafafa; color: #18181b; padding: 16px; font: 400 14px/1.5 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace; } .ds-code-field::placeholder { color: #71717a; } .ds-code-field:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; outline: 1px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 0; } .ds-code-field:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Language Select
components.description: Compact language selector paired with a text label.
components.css: .ds-select-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: #3f3f46; font: 500 14px/1.5 Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-select { border: 1px solid #d4d4d8; border-radius: 6px; background: #ffffff; color: #171717; padding: 6px 12px; font: 400 14px/1.5 Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-select:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-select:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Result Panel
components.html:
Results

Review findings appear here with compact headings, lists, and emphasis.
components.css: .ds-result-panel { max-height: 512px; overflow: auto; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #3f3f46; padding: 24px; font: 400 14px/1.5 Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-result-panel h2 { margin: 0 0 8px; color: #18181b; font: 700 18px/1.55 Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-result-panel p { margin: 0; }

components.name: Empty Result State
components.description: Dashed placeholder state before a review has run.
components.html: Paste some code and run a review
components.css: .ds-empty-state { min-height: 320px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px dashed #d4d4d8; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #71717a; padding: 24px; text-align: center; font: 400 14px/1.5 Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-empty-state p { margin: 0; }

components.name: Error Message
components.css: .ds-error { border: 1px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 8px; background: #fef2f2; color: #991b1b; padding: 16px; font: 400 14px/1.5 Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; }

components.name: Token Chip
components.description: Small passive metadata chip for token usage.
components.css: .ds-token-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 6px; background: #f4f4f5; color: #71717a; padding: 4px 8px; font: 400 12px/1.5 Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Compact top bar with brand link and decorative avatar.
components.css: .ds-nav { height: 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e4e7; background: #ffffff; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #171717; text-decoration: none; font: 700 18px/1.2 Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-brand:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-avatar { width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f4f4f5; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; }

narrative.overview:
Code Review currently uses a flat, restrained interface that behaves like a clean workbench: a place to paste code, run a review, and read findings without decorative interference. The system is mostly white, zinc, and near-black, with borders doing the work that shadows often do elsewhere.

The brand context asks for minimalism and explicitly rejects dark-purple AI SaaS. This design system should preserve the plainspoken restraint in the existing UI while giving future landing work enough structure to feel intentional rather than default.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained monochrome foundation with sparse state color.
Flat surfaces, visible borders, and compact radii.
Geist sans for product language, Geist Mono only where code is the material.
Clear two-column working layout on desktop, stacked flow on smaller screens.
No glossy AI motifs, neon gradients, or dark-purple presentation tropes.

rules.name: The Restraint Rule
rules.body: Use one strong action color per surface. Today that color is graphite, with blue reserved for focus and red reserved for errors.

rules.name: The No Purple AI Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce dark-purple gradients, neon violet glows, or glossy AI surfaces. If a future brand accent is added, it must support minimal precision instead of signaling generic AI.

rules.name: The Code Is The Texture Rule
rules.body: Monospace belongs to code and code output. The surrounding brand voice stays in Geist sans.

rules.name: The Flat By Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces sit on the page. Use borders, background shifts, and spacing before adding a shadow.

dos: Do keep the palette restrained: white, near-black, zinc neutrals, one focus blue, one error red.
Do use real review language: security, organization, readability, architecture, logic.
Do preserve strong contrast for body text, placeholder text, controls, and error states.
Do keep forms and results close together so the landing surface demonstrates the actual review workflow.
Do add any future brand color with discipline, using it for identity and emphasis rather than generic AI decoration.
donts: Don't make this dark-purple AI SaaS.
Don't use neon gradients, glossy AI motifs, glass panels, or template-like hero metrics.
Don't use gradient text or repeated tiny uppercase section eyebrows.
Don't use monospace for all brand copy just because the audience is developers.
Don't pair 1px borders with large soft shadows on cards or buttons.
